testcase.name: test_a1_get_users_returns_pagination_fields
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:138: in super_admin_a_token create_partner_user_via_tenant_endpoint( backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:80: in create_partner_user_via_tenant_endpoint assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Create partner user via tenant endpoint failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create partner user via tenant endpoint failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","tenant_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST.super.a@iter109.test","password":"TestSuper109!A","full_name":"Test partner_super_admin","role":"partner_super_admin"}}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
